seoTitle: Lytton vs Maadi — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lytton and Maadi. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lytton and Maadi.
heading: Lytton vs Maadi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lytton, Queensland and Maadi, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lytton and Maadi have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Lytton or Maadi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lytton has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Maadi scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lytton scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Maadi scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lytton or Maadi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lytton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
